---
name: Open Question
about: An unresolved ontology question to chase toward Decision Readiness
title: "[Open Question] "
labels: open-question
---

## The question

_What is unclear, disputed, missing, or assumed?_

## Why it matters

_What decision would this change? What would most improve because we answered it?_

## Ontology touchpoint

_Which building block does this concern?_

- [ ] Concept
- [ ] Relationship
- [ ] Rule
- [ ] State
- [ ] Action

## Kind of gap

- [ ] Intent-gap — the source artifact hasn't decided yet (resolve with the author/owner)
- [ ] Evidence-gap — the artifact and reality may disagree (resolve by checking reality)

## Owner

_Who is accountable for moving this toward a decision?_

## Resolution

_Filled in when closed: what was decided, and where the ontology was updated to keep the answer._
